props.title: Health
props.action_order: Cloud sign-in | Refresh experiments | Repair install

a11y.accessible_description: Health page header with inline cloud and repair actions.

states.loading: Keep the active header action disabled and swap its visible label to gerund progress text.
states.error: Route cloud-action failures and prerequisites to the page AlertBanner rather than a new dialog or route.

a11y.accessible_description: Page-level health warning and prerequisite feedback.

states.empty: Hide when no page-scoped health or cloud-action error exists.
states.error: Show prerequisite and failure copy inline on the Health page without opening a modal failure workflow.

a11y.accessible_description: Health rollup cards remain visible while cloud and repair actions run.

states.loading: Do not replace the rollup grid when cloud actions are in progress.
states.error: Keep rollup cards visible while the AlertBanner explains the action problem.

a11y.accessible_description: Overall Health state and snapshot time.

states.loading: Preserve current overall-state readback during cloud actions.

a11y.accessible_description: Count of degraded Health subsystems that need attention.

states.loading: Do not collapse the needs-attention card while header actions run.
Keep recovery-state readback visible while repair or cloud actions are running.

a11y.accessible_description: Count of Health subsystems in error state and the first operator hint.

states.loading: Keep the error summary visible so operators can judge whether cloud actions changed readiness.

a11y.accessible_description: Empty state shown before the first Health snapshot arrives.

states.empty: Show until the first Health snapshot exists; cloud actions do not create a second empty workflow.

a11y.accessible_description: Newest Health alerts first, including cloud-action follow-up readback.

states.loading: Keep the alert timeline mounted while header actions run.
states.error: Use alert rows as follow-up evidence after page-scoped banner failures.

invariants: Keep cloud sign-in and experiment refresh inside the existing Health header action row; do not add a new route, drawer, account pane, or ActionBar control.
Header action order stays prerequisite-first: Cloud sign-in, Refresh experiments, Repair install.
Cloud sign-in and Refresh experiments remain one-click actions; Repair install remains the only confirmed action.
Inline Health action status communicates in-progress and success states, while AlertBanner remains the failure and prerequisite surface.
Operator-facing action labels, progress text, success text, and prerequisite copy come from formatter helpers rather than inline view strings.
The refresh prerequisite message must read: Cloud sign-in is required before refreshing experiments.
Narrow-width Health layouts stack the inline status text and header actions under the page title without clipping or overlap.

Visual verification is required: run uv run python scripts/render_console_screens.py and inspect the Health route PNGs at narrow, medium, and wide widths for header wrapping, button alignment, status visibility, and alert-banner placement.
